requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Zimbabwe Local Fire Authority Approval and IEC 62933-5-2 Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——津巴布韦本地消防主管机关批准及IEC 62933-5-2要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——辛巴威本地消防主管機關批准及IEC 62933-5-2要求

summary.en: In Zimbabwe, fire safety approval for commercial and industrial BESS installations is administered by local fire authorities (municipal fire departments and, for mining sites, the Ministry of Mines and Mining Development / MHTE). Zimbabwe does not have a single national BESS fire-installation code equivalent to NFPA 855. Fire safety requirements are drawn from a combination of SAZ-adopted IEC standards, local authority bylaws, building codes, and project-owner specifications. IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based Energy Storage Systems) is the internationally expected system-level fire and safety standard for stationary BESS and is typically referenced in utility-scale and C&I project specifications in Zimbabwe. IEC 62619 provides the cell and module safety baseline. Project teams should engage the relevant local fire authority and, where applicable, MHTE mine inspectors at the earliest project stage to determine the specific fire code requirements, suppression system design expectations, and approval process for BESS enclosures. Thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection/ventilation, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances are key design considerations in any local authority review.
summary.zh: 在津巴布韦，商业及工业BESS装置的消防安全批准由本地消防主管机关（市政消防部门，以及矿业现场的矿业及矿业开发部/MHTE）负责。津巴布韦尚无相当于NFPA 855的单一国家BESS消防安装规范。消防安全要求来源于SAZ采纳的IEC标准、地方主管机关法规、建筑规范及项目业主规格的综合体系。IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）是固定式BESS的国际预期系统级消防和安全标准，在津巴布韦的公用事业规模和工商业项目规格中通常被引用。IEC 62619提供电芯和模组安全基准。项目团队应在项目最早阶段与相关本地消防主管机关及（如适用）MHTE矿山检查员接触，以确定BESS机柜的具体消防规范要求、抑制系统设计预期及审批流程。热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测/通风、紧急停机程序及隔离距离是本地主管机关审查中的关键设计考量。
summary.zht: 在辛巴威，商業及工業BESS裝置的消防安全批准由本地消防主管機關（市政消防部門，以及礦業現場的礦業及礦業開發部/MHTE）負責。辛巴威尚無相當於NFPA 855的單一國家BESS消防安裝規範。消防安全要求來源於SAZ採納的IEC標準、地方主管機關法規、建築規範及項目業主規格的綜合體系。IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）是固定式BESS的國際預期系統級消防和安全標準，在辛巴威的公用事業規模和工商業項目規格中通常被引用。IEC 62619提供電芯和模組安全基準。項目團隊應在項目最早階段與相關本地消防主管機關及（如適用）MHTE礦山檢查員接觸，以確定BESS機櫃的具體消防規範要求、抑制系統設計預期及審批流程。熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測/通風、緊急停機程序及隔離距離是本地主管機關審查中的關鍵設計考量。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (internationally expected fire and safety standard for stationary BESS; referenced in Zimbabwe utility-scale and C&I project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (cell and module safety baseline)
Zimbabwe local fire authority bylaws and municipal regulations — apply to BESS enclosure installation approvals at commercial and industrial sites
Ministry of Mines and Mining Development (MHTE) regulations — apply to captive BESS installations at mining sites (gold, platinum, lithium)

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules (mandatory, effective August 1, 2025). GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) covers system-level safety including fire-related requirements. GB/T 31485-2015 (Safety Requirements and Test Methods for Traction Battery of Electric Vehicle) provides an earlier battery safety reference. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Zimbabwe local fire authorities or project owners as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 system-level fire-safety requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC 62933-5-2-aligned design documentation for Zimbabwe project and authority review.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定（强制性，自2025年8月1日起生效）。GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。GB/T 31485-2015（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求及试验方法）提供早期电池安全参考。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被津巴布韦本地消防主管机关或项目业主认可为等同于IEC 62933-5-2系统级消防安全要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在津巴布韦项目和主管机关审查中补充符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的设计文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定（強制性，自2025年8月1日起生效）。GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。GB/T 31485-2015（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求及試驗方法）提供早期電池安全參考。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被辛巴威本地消防主管機關或項目業主認可為等同於IEC 62933-5-2系統級消防安全要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在辛巴威項目和主管機關審查中補充符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的設計文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 31485-2015 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求及试验方法 (Safety Requirements and Test Methods for Traction Battery of Electric Vehicle)

gap.en: Gap: Zimbabwe does not have a single mandatory national BESS fire-installation code; local fire authority approval is required for commercial and industrial BESS installations and must be obtained from the relevant municipal authority or MHTE mine inspector before commissioning. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy Zimbabwe project or authority expectations for IEC 62933-5-2 system-level fire-safety evidence. Exporters and project teams should: (a) identify the relevant local fire authority (municipal or MHTE) for the installation site and engage them before system layout is finalised; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with IEC 62933-5-2 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) confirm whether project-owner or financier specifications impose additional fire-safety requirements such as third-party fire-safety system certification; (d) for mining captive systems, comply with MHTE mine regulations for stationary energy storage installations, which may impose additional safety, reporting, and inspection obligations.
gap.zh: 差距：津巴布韦尚无单一强制性国家BESS消防安装规范；商业及工业BESS装置须取得相关本地消防主管机关批准，须在调试前从相关市政主管机关或MHTE矿山检查员处取得。基于GB标准的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足津巴布韦项目或主管机关对IEC 62933-5-2系统级消防安全证据的预期。出口商和项目团队应：（a）确定安装现场的相关本地消防主管机关（市政或MHTE），并在系统布局最终确定前与其接触；（b）准备符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）确认项目业主或融资方规格是否提出额外消防安全要求，如第三方消防安全系统认证；（d）对于矿业自备系统，遵守MHTE关于固定式储能装置的矿山法规，其中可能规定额外的安全、报告和检查义务。
gap.zht: 差距：辛巴威尚無單一強制性國家BESS消防安裝規範；商業及工業BESS裝置須取得相關本地消防主管機關批准，須在調試前從相關市政主管機關或MHTE礦山檢查員處取得。基於GB標準的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足辛巴威項目或主管機關對IEC 62933-5-2系統級消防安全證據的預期。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）確定安裝現場的相關本地消防主管機關（市政或MHTE），並在系統布局最終確定前與其接觸；（b）準備符合IEC 62933-5-2要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）確認項目業主或融資方規格是否提出額外消防安全要求，如第三方消防安全系統認證；（d）對於礦業自備系統，遵守MHTE關於固定式儲能裝置的礦山法規，其中可能規定額外的安全、報告和檢查義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — local fire authority approval required for all commercial and industrial BESS installations in Zimbabwe before commissioning; specific fire code (IEC 62933-5-2 or equivalent) determined by local authority and project-owner specifications — verify directly with the relevant authority
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) — IEC 62933 series (SAZ adopted via IEC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Local fire authority approval is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS in Zimbabwe; no single national BESS fire code is confirmed. IEC 62933-5-2 is the internationally expected system-level fire and safety standard and is typically referenced in Zimbabwe project specifications. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy IEC 62933-5-2 system-level evidence expectations. Engage the relevant local fire authority (municipal or MHTE for mining sites) and a qualified fire protection engineer at the earliest project stage to confirm applicable requirements, design expectations, and approval process before committing to system layout or equipment specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 本地消防主管机关批准是津巴布韦商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛；尚无经确认的单一国家BESS消防规范。IEC 62933-5-2是国际预期系统级消防和安全标准，在津巴布韦项目规格中通常被引用。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足IEC 62933-5-2系统级证据预期。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与相关本地消防主管机关（市政或矿业现场的MHTE）及合格消防工程师接触，确认适用要求、设计预期及审批流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 本地消防主管機關批准是辛巴威商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻；尚無經確認的單一國家BESS消防規範。IEC 62933-5-2是國際預期系統級消防和安全標準，在辛巴威項目規格中通常被引用。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足IEC 62933-5-2系統級證據預期。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與相關本地消防主管機關（市政或礦業現場的MHTE）及合格消防工程師接觸，確認適用要求、設計預期及審批流程。
